title: Pixelated Thaumaturgy
description: It's like regular thaumaturgy, but on a smaller scale
body:
Thaumcraft is a mod beloved by many, myself included. Its one of the first and best magic mods ever created.

But

_Have you ever wondered how would it look like if its style was more like vanilla MC?_ Well then, keep wondering or use this subpar resourcepack.


This resourcepack attempts to make some of Thaumcraft's more high resolution textures, like its particles to "fit" more with vanilla MC.

Changes:
- Some of the particles
- **Partial** (and not very good) aura node retexture
- Infused stone texture
- WF:Excavation/Arcane Bore/Vis Relay beam
- [Et Futurum](https://modrinth.com/mod/etfuturum)'s deepslate infused stone variant (thanks to Roadhog360!)

**NOTE:** _Right now, ONLY Thaumcraft 4 for 1.7.10 is supported. Other versions of Thaumcraft will probably won't be supported because I'm lazy._

**NOTE 2:** _I am so lazy infact, that this project is unlikely to be continued. Maybe some day?_
